02/15/2026.definition: to officially choose someone for a position or responsibility

02/15/2026.definition: to compete with someone in an election or contest

02/15/2026.definition: to use something effectively in order to gain an advantage

02/15/2026.definition: lacking human warmth, emotion, or moral sensitivity

02/15/2026.definition: used to introduce a contrast or correction

02/15/2026.definition: a stretch of land, especially with regard to its physical features or suitability for some use

02/15/2026.definition: turned into a fossil through the replacement of organic material with minerals over long periods

02/15/2026.definition: to join or decorate with loops of thread or yarn passed through fabric or material with a needle

02/15/2026.definition: having eight points or rays extending outward from a center, often in a star shape

02/15/2026.definition: imposing limits or restrictions; tending to restrict freedom or options

02/15/2026.word: make a name for somebody as
02/15/2026.definition: to become well-known or recognized for a particular skill, talent, or achievement

02/15/2026.definition: to express an opinion, support, or feeling publicly or clearly

02/15/2026.definition: favoring or enforcing strict obedience to authority at the expense of personal freedom; characteristic of a ruler or system with absolute power
